issues.description: Action type 'FlipLife' is incorrect. The effect adds a Character card to Life cards, not flipping Life totals. This requires a custom action or should use a more appropriate mechanic. 'FlipLife' is for converting Life cards to hand or vice versa.
Missing target specification: the action must search/select 'up to 1 Character with cost ≤8' and specify placement ('top or bottom of owner's Life cards face-up'). Current DSL has no targeting logic.
The DSL lacks the conditional selection mechanic needed for 'up to 1' with cost restriction. Standard actions don't capture the search-and-place-on-Life behavior described in the card text.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Add up to 1 Character with a cost of 8 or less to the top or bottom of the owner's Life cards face-up.
